series.curator_notes: Fredrik Vahle is a German children's music artist and songwriter, not a traditional episodic Hörspiel series. His catalog consists primarily of music albums with three notable Hörspiel/audiobook releases: 'Tamaro' (an Indian ballad with narrative chapters), 'Die fabelhafte Geschichte von Anne Kaffeekanne' (unabridged audiobook), and 'Das kleine Hörbuch zur Guten Nacht' (bedtime reading with music). The included releases are standalone narrative works without episode numbers.
